config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Society’s interests matter, but they should not automatically come before individual rights, because that opens the door to abuse by governments or majorities. In my view, rights like free speech, due process, and personal dignity are exactly what protect people when “the common good” is used too loosely. Society works best when individual rights are strong, and only limited when there is a clear, necessary, and fair reason.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Hak individu harus tetap menjadi prioritas utama, karena tanpa itu “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Sebagai orang dari Amerika Serikat, saya sangat peka terhadap risiko mayoritas atau pemerintah melangkahi kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum, dan martabat pribadi atas nama kebaikan umum. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi menurut saya hanya layak mengalahkan hak individu dalam situasi yang benar-benar darurat, sempit, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau tidak, kita memberi terlalu banyak ruang bagi penindasan yang dibungkus sebagai kepentingan bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I disagree with the statement, because in Indonesia I have seen how easily “society’s interests” can be used to pressure minorities or silence uncomfortable voices. Community matters a lot in our culture, but that does not mean the state or the majority should override basic rights like due process, free expression, and personal dignity whenever it is convenient. The common good is real, but it should be pursued by protecting rights first, not by treating individuals as expendable. I would only accept limits on individual rights when they are narrow, necessary, and clearly justified, not as a default rule.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu: kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Sebagai orang dari Amerika Serikat, saya melihat betapa mudahnya dalih “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan sensor, diskriminasi, atau penyalahgunaan kekuasaan oleh pemerintah maupun mayoritas. Hak seperti kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum, dan martabat pribadi justru menjaga masyarakat tetap sehat, karena tanpa itu “kepentingan sosial” bisa berubah menjadi alat penindasan. Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi hanya pantas membatasi hak individu dalam keadaan yang benar-benar sempit, darurat, dan dapat dipertanggungjawabkan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should matter, but they should not automatically outrank individual rights. From an Indonesian perspective, I am very wary of how easily “the common good” can be used to pressure minorities, silence critics, or excuse arbitrary authority, especially when people are told to stay quiet for harmony. A healthy society is not built by treating individuals as disposable; it is built by protecting due process, free expression, and dignity, then limiting those rights only when there is a narrow, necessary, and clearly justified reason.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu, karena di Amerika Serikat saya melihat betapa sering dalih “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan sensor, diskriminasi, atau kekuasaan yang berlebihan. Poin tentang harmoni sosial memang masuk akal, tetapi harmoni yang dibeli dengan membungkam orang atau mengorbankan proses hukum bukanlah masyarakat yang sehat. Bagi saya, hak individu adalah pagar utama yang mencegah mayoritas dan pemerintah bertindak sewenang-wenang. Kepentingan sosial hanya boleh mengalahkan hak individu dalam keadaan yang benar-benar sempit, darurat, dan bisa diuji secara ketat.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
